## Friction signals

- **CRIT: Engineering pipeline stalled.** 0 `auto-implemented` PRs merged
  this week vs 38 prior week. 22 cancelled Agent 3 runs + 4 issues filed
  today (#748-#751) without matching PRs. Owner: `role-engineering`;
  root-cause the cancellations.
- **Autohealing-escalation rate up.** 4 unresolved escalations across
  Agents 1/2/3/5 + CI Auto-Fix; two new this week (#753, #743). Either
  Autohealing prompt is over-bailing or upstream agents fail in shapes
  Autohealing was not designed for. Owner: `role-infrastructure`.
- **CI Auto-Fix all attempts failed (0/4).** Prompt drift or transient
  errors exhausting `KILO_RETRIES`. Worth log-grep on the 4 failed runs.
  Owner: `role-infrastructure`.
- **Encoding Guard now clean** (52/52 success). Previous finding
  (2026-06-03: 10/36 failures on sync chain) has resolved.
- **Documentation Update** still cancellation-heavy (5 cancelled / 4 ok)
  but no >2h hangs this week -- improvement vs 2026-06-03.

## Prompt-quality scan (11 files)

To be filed as PR comments on the prompt files (this role recommends,
does not rewrite):

1. `role-architecture.md` -- no "When blocked" / escalation guidance.
   Recommend: open `architecture-review`-tagged issue with conflicting PR
   number, hand off to maintainer.
2. `role-product.md` -- no escalation path AND no handling of stale /
   missing research brief. Given Agent 1 had 1 fail / 1 cancel this week,
   recommend: "If latest brief is >48h old, comment on previous tracking
   issue and skip the cycle; do NOT invent a research source."
3. `agent2-planning-task.md` -- no exit branch when
   `{{OPEN_COUNT}} >= {{MAX_ISSUES}}`. Recommend step 0: write plan with
   a `backlog-saturated` note and exit before creating issues. Backlog
   went 0 -> 5 in a week; next planning run could duplicate.
4. `agent3-implement-task.md` (carry-over from 2026-06-03) -- still no
   explicit DoD. Recommend: *"Done when: PR opened against the source
   issue, all 5 gates green locally, subject <= 100 chars, scope from
   commitlint scope-enum."*
5. `agent5-release-system.md` (carry-over) -- no explicit DoD; failure
   this week (#743). Recommend: *"Done when: exactly one semver tag is
   created OR a no-release commit is recorded with reasoning."*
6. `agent4-review-system.md` (carry-over) -- recommend: *"Done when:
   review posted as a single PR comment with verdict and >=1 cited line
   range."*
7. `agent1-research-task.md` (carry-over) -- recommend: *"Done when:
   `.github/research/<DATE>-research.md` exists with non-empty Executive
   Summary and upstream commits cited by SHA."*
8. `role-security.md`, `role-management.md` -- one vague verb each
   (`carefully`); low priority, flagged not filed.

No findings: `role-consulting`, `role-data`, `role-design`,
